inlineCodes.title: Inline Codes
inlineCodes.description: Pattern-based detection of inline codes (placeholders, variables, tags) within translatable text.

extraction.title: Control what content is extracted for translation

extractAll.title: Extract all key-value pairs
extractAll.description: Extract all key-value pairs for translation.

includeIsolatedStrings.title: Extract Isolated Strings
includeIsolatedStrings.description: Extract string values that are not directly associated with a key.

excludeKeys.title: Key Exception Pattern
excludeKeys.description: Regular expression for keys that behave opposite to the default extraction mode.

keys.title: Configure how YAML keys map to text unit identification

useAsName.title: Use YAML key as text unit name
useAsName.description: Use YAML key as the Block name for reference.

useFullPath.title: Use full path as name
useFullPath.description: Use full nested path as the name instead of immediate key.

subFilterProcessLiteralAsBlock.title: Sub-filter Literal Blocks
subFilterProcessLiteralAsBlock.description: Process YAML literal block scalars through the configured sub-filter.

enabled.title: Enable Inline Code Detection
enabled.description: Enable pattern-based detection of inline codes (placeholders, tags, etc.)

mergeAdjacent.title: Merge Adjacent Codes
mergeAdjacent.description: Merge consecutive inline codes into a single placeholder

moveBoundaryCodes.title: Move Boundary Codes
moveBoundaryCodes.description: Move inline codes at segment boundaries to the skeleton (non-translatable)

simplifierRules.title: Simplifier Rules
simplifierRules.description: Rules for simplifying inline code representation

codeFinderRules.title: Code Finder Rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns for inline code detection

rules.title: Patterns
rules.description: List of regex patterns to detect inline codes

pattern.title: Pattern
pattern.description: Regex pattern for inline code detection

sample.title: Sample Text
sample.description: Sample text to test patterns against

useAllRulesWhenTesting.title: Test All Rules Together
useAllRulesWhenTesting.description: Test all rules together or individually

simplifierRules.title: Simplifier Rules
simplifierRules.description: Rules for simplifying inline code representation
